name: DotnetAgents.CalDav.Mcp
description: MCP server for CalDAV task management — create, update, complete, and query tasks via CalDAV.

CALDAV_URL.description: Base URL of the CalDAV server (e.g. https://caldav.example.com)

CALDAV_TASK_LISTS.description: Comma-separated list of task list hrefs to expose (optional; omit to auto-discover)

CALDAV_DEFAULT_TASK_LIST.description: Display name of the default task list to use when chat requests omit an explicit list name (optional)

CALDAV_EXPOSE_ADVANCED_TOOLS.description: Set to true to expose advanced href-based tools alongside the chat-safe surface (optional)
